hooks.command: if grep -qiE '("quote"|sentence [0-9]|line [0-9]|story_id|trigger_text)' feedback.json 2>/dev/null; then echo 'BLOCK: scorer leaked per-example detail into feedback.json'; exit 1; fi; exit 0

if git -C pipeline diff 2>/dev/null | grep -qiE '(Ivashko|Nikita|Bukhtan|Shabarsha|Frolka|Popyalov|hedgehog|\bversts\b)'; then echo 'BLOCK: improver hard-coded a story-specific string'; exit 1; fi; exit 0
git -C . diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^score.py$' && echo 'BLOCK: improver must not edit score.py (the fixed ruler)' && exit 1; exit 0
